summary: Completed static code analysis of VideoPlayer.jsx refactoring. All required features successfully implemented including ABR configuration, French language cascade selection (VFF → VFQ → VOSTFR), and UI preservation.
passed_tests: Component export - VideoPlayer function properly exported
ABR configuration - All required parameters present (abrEwmaDefaultEstimate, abrBandWidthFactor, abrBandWidthUpFactor, abrMaxWithRealBitrate, capLevelToPlayerSize, startLevel: -1)
French detection functions - isFrenchTrack, isVFF, isVFQ correctly implemented
Cascade algorithm - executerSelectionAutomatique implements VFF → VFQ → FR → VOSTFR logic
Subtitle fallback - appliquerSelectionSousTitres function handles textTracks activation
Auto-lock mechanism - autoLangApplied ref prevents re-execution
UI preservation - All Tailwind, Framer Motion, touch controls maintained
HLS events - MANIFEST_PARSED, AUDIO_TRACKS_UPDATED, SUBTITLE_TRACKS_UPDATED, ERROR handlers present
Error handling - NETWORK_ERROR, MEDIA_ERROR recovery and fallback logic implemented
Safari fallback - Native HLS support detection for WebKit browsers
